introduction:
In Telangana, the Caste Certificate is issued by the Tahsildar (Revenue Department) for SC, ST, BC (Backward Classes — A, B, C, D, E), and EWS applicants. The certificate is essential for educational reservations, government job applications, and welfare scheme benefits.

Applications can be submitted online through the Mee Seva / TS e-Pass Portal or offline at the nearest Mee Seva centre or Tahsildar office. Telangana has a unique BC classification system with 5 sub-groups (A–E).
quickFacts:
Important to Know
  • Issued by the Tahsildar of the applicant's native mandal
  • Processing time: 7–15 working days
  • Fee: ₹35–₹45 (via Mee Seva)
  • SC/ST certificates are permanent; BC certificates valid for 3 years
  • Online portal: Mee Seva / TS e-Pass Portal
  • BC sub-groups: BC-A, BC-B, BC-C, BC-D, BC-E
documentsRequired:
Documents Required

Identity Proof
  • Aadhaar Card
  • Voter ID
  • Ration Card
  • Passport
Caste / Nativity Proof
  • Father's Caste Certificate
  • Class X / SSC Certificate showing caste
  • Pattadar Passbook / Revenue records
  • Old Ration Card with caste
Additional (BC)
  • Income Certificate (Non-Creamy Layer — ₹8 lakh limit)
  • Residence Certificate of native village
  • Passport-size photographs (2)
onlineApplication:
Method 1: Apply Online via Mee Seva / TS e-Pass Portal

Apply at Mee Seva Portal or TS e-Pass Portal

  1. Visit Mee Seva Portal
    Go to meeseva.telangana.gov.in
  2. Register / Login
    Register using your mobile number. Verify via OTP.
  3. Select Service
    Choose 'Caste Certificate' from Revenue Department services.
  4. Fill Application
    Enter name, DOB, caste, BC sub-group, mandal, district, and native village details.
  5. Upload Documents
    Upload scanned copies of required documents.
  6. Pay Fee
    Pay ₹35–₹45 online via UPI / Debit Card / Net Banking.
  7. Submit & Track
    Submit and track using your acknowledgement number.
  8. Download Certificate
    Download the digitally signed certificate from Mee Seva once approved.
Apply at any Mee Seva centre near you with minimal documents for assisted submission.
offlineApplication:
Method 2: Apply Offline at Mee Seva Centre / Tahsildar Office

  1. Visit Mee Seva Centre or Tahsildar Office
    Go to your nearest Mee Seva centre or Tahsildar office in your native mandal.
  2. Collect & Fill Form
    Obtain the application form and fill all required details including caste sub-group.
  3. Submit with Documents
    Submit self-attested documents with the form and pay the fee.
  4. VRO / VAO Verification
    The Village Revenue Officer (VRO) or Village Administrative Officer will verify caste and residence at the native village level.
  5. Collect Certificate
    Collect your caste certificate from the Tahsildar office within 7–15 working days.
Processing Time: 7–15 working days.
afterApplying:
After Applying — What Next?

Track Application

Track at Mee Seva Portal using your acknowledgement number.

BC Renewal

BC certificates are valid for 3 years. Renew via Mee Seva before expiry to avoid disruption of benefits.

Grievance

Call 1100 (TS CM Helpline) or file at Central PG Portal.
